name: blog-visual-tests
description: Visual snapshot tests for the blog (Playwright, run in a pinned linux/amd64 container so baselines match CI).

scripts.snap:test: npm run snap:image && docker run --rm --platform=linux/arm64 -v "$PWD":/work -v blog-snap-modules:/work/node_modules -w /work blog-snapshots sh -lc "npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run test:visual"
scripts.snap:update: npm run snap:image && docker run --rm --platform=linux/arm64 -v "$PWD":/work -v blog-snap-modules:/work/node_modules -w /work blog-snapshots sh -lc "npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run test:visual:update"
